name: In Utah, how long do I have to file for work hearing damage?

mainEntity.name: In Utah, how long do I have to file for work hearing damage?

acceptedAnswer.description: You have 1 year from the last significant noise exposure for occupational hearing loss claims.[3] Context: Utah Workers’ Compensation Act treats NIHL as occupational disease with short SOL for employer protection.[3] Key factors: Date of final injurious exposure, not diagnosis; appeals may extend.[3] Practical guidance: Track exposure end date, file with Utah Labor Commission immediately after audiogram; consult attorney to avoid missing deadline.[3][7] Precision timing is critical.
